meaning: [复]n.[解](器官的)附件(如眼睛的眼睑和泪腺,尤指胚胎的胚膜及其他临时部份)
examples: Objective To study the effective therapy of benign adnexa cyst.
To explore the clinical application of mini-laparoscopic in adnexa uteri cysts.
The most common clinical manifestations were the damage of skin and adnexa, which accounted for47.3% (71cases).
